text: If it becomes necessary to thaw a hand with deep frostbite you should ensure that:

options.text: The patient sees a doctor no later than 48 hrs after thawing
There is no danger of refreezing
Adequate pain relief medication is available
Capillary refill takes no longer than 15 seconds

explanation: If thawing frozen tissue, it is critical to ensure there is no chance of the area refreezing. Refreezing causes massive cellular destruction and irreversible damage to the tissue.
